problemSummary: Configuration migration drops a required field.
reproductionEvidence: Run the migration regression test and observe the missing field.
observedBehavior: The migrated output omits the required field.
expectedBehavior: The migrated output preserves the required field.
rootCauseSummary: Normalization did not copy the field after migration.
causalChain: Normalization omits it from the final object.
constraints: Keep the patch scoped to migration normalization.

verificationCriteria.description: The field is preserved by migration.
